title: Fix GitHub Actions Failures - Root Cause Analysis
currentGoal: Fix GitHub Actions failures and prepare for successful deployments
completedWork: Identified root cause: TypeScript error in model-selector.ts (const reassignment)
Fixed: changed const modelCosts to let modelCosts
blockers: Need to verify Cloudflare secrets in GitHub
decisions: Fixed TypeScript build error in model-selector.ts
Staging placeholders need actual Cloudflare resource IDs or should be conditional
notes: The main issue was a TypeScript error preventing API build. Local build works but CI was failing. Staging workflow has placeholder IDs that will cause failures until replaced with actual resource IDs.
